Class Career

java.lang.Object
sims.career.Career
public class Career extends Object
Represents a career path for a Sim. A Career defines the Sim's job title, sector, salary, level, and experience points (XP). Sims can earn XP through work, which increases their career level and provides salary bonuses.

This class provides methods to manage career progression, calculate bonuses, and update career attributes such as title, sector, and salary.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Career()
    Constructs a default Career with: Title = "Unemployed" Sector = "Unemployed" Salary = 0 Level = 1 XP = 0
    Career(String title, String sector, int salary)
    Constructs a Career with the specified title, sector, and salary.

    Increases career XP by 20 points.

  • Constructor Details

    • Career

      public Career()
      Constructs a default Career with:
      • Title = "Unemployed"
      • Sector = "Unemployed"
      • Salary = 0
      • Level = 1
      • XP = 0

    • Career

      public Career(String title, String sector, int salary)
      Constructs a Career with the specified title, sector, and salary. Level is initialized to 1 and XP to 0.
      Parameters:
      title - the job title
      sector - the career sector
      salary - the base salary

  • Method Details

    • getLevel

      public int getLevel()
      Returns the current career level.
      Returns:
      the career level

    • getBonus

      public double getBonus()
      Calculates the bonus based on the career level. The bonus is a percentage of the salary equal to level / 100.
      Returns:
      the salary bonus

    • earnXP

      public void earnXP()
      Increases career XP by 20 points. If XP reaches or exceeds 100, the career level increases by 1 and XP is reset modulo 100.

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Returns the job title of the career.
      Returns:
      the career title

    • getSector

      public String getSector()
      Returns the job sectir of the career.
      Returns:
      the career sector

    • getSalary

      public int getSalary()
      Returns the base salary of the career.
      Returns:
      the salary

    • setTitle

      public void setTitle(String title)
      Sets the job title of the career.
      Parameters:
      title - the new career title

    • setSector

      public void setSector(String sector)
      Sets the sector of the career.
      Parameters:
      sector - the new career sector

    • setSalary

      public void setSalary(int salary)
      Sets the base salary of the career.
      Parameters:
      salary - the new salary
